title: Transactions, Isolation, Concurrency, and Recovery · Data Contract Brief: Begin Commit Rollback
summary: Two operators reassign and resolve the same ticket while a failure occurs between related writes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql begin commit rollback increment in a concurrency-safe ticket transition protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound a unit of work with BEGIN, COMMIT, ROLLBACK, and savepoints and verify failure behavior.
Explain atomicity, consistency, isolation, and durability using a multi-statement business invariant.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.
